common_tasks.check_iam: aws sts get-caller-identity && aws iam get-user

ec2_unreachable: Check instance state: aws ec2 describe-instance-status --instance-id <id>
Check security groups: aws ec2 describe-security-groups --group-ids <sg-id>
Check network ACLs and route tables
Check VPC flow logs for denied traffic
Try Session Manager: aws ssm start-session --target <id>
eks_issues: Check cluster status: aws eks describe-cluster --name <cluster>
Check node groups: aws eks list-nodegroups --cluster-name <cluster>

aks_issues: Check cluster status: az aks show --resource-group <rg> --name <cluster>
Check node pools: az aks nodepool list --resource-group <rg> --cluster-name <cluster>
Check Azure CNI or kubenet issues

common_tasks.check_identity: gcloud auth list && gcloud config get-value project

gke_issues: Get credentials: gcloud container clusters get-credentials <cluster> --zone <zone>
Check cluster status: gcloud container clusters describe <cluster> --zone <zone>
Check node pools: gcloud container node-pools list --cluster <cluster> --zone <zone>
Check network policies and firewall rules
